title: How Anthropic Doesn't Build the WRONG Things with Claude
summary: Austin Marchese outlines four rules attributed to Anthropic founders Dario and Daniela Amodei for deciding what to build with Claude, positioning these as a framework to avoid building wrong products. The video analyzes their product development philosophy based on publicly available founder commentary.
